body: After the opening cutscene, Persona 3 Reload begins with the protagonist arriving at Iwatodai Station. Once Makoto Yuki steps off the platform and reaches the streets of Port Island, you will gain control for the first time.

label: Iwatodai Station
alt: Iwatodai Station during the Dark Hour

body: Now that you are officially in control, head southwest until the prompt to go to Iwatodai Strip Mall appears. Press X / A to travel there.

label: Iwatodai Strip Mall 1F
alt: Iwatodai Strip Mall during the Dark Hour

body: Once you arrive in the Strip Mall, you can look around the area and inspect the nearby coffins. After that, take a right at the Wild-duck Burger restaurant. Another prompt will appear, this time leading you to the Dorm. Press X / A again to trigger the next cutscene.

label: Mysterious Contract
alt: Makoto signing the mysterious contract

body: This cutscene is long and shows Makoto heading to the dormitory before signing a mysterious contract. Here, you can choose a name for the protagonist. This guide will continue referring to him by his canonical name, Makoto Yuki, going forward. Once the contract scene ends, you will enter a new conversation with two of the dorm's residents and receive your first dialogue options.

label: Iwatodai Dormitory
alt: Makoto meeting Yukari and Mitsuru at Iwatodai Dormitory

body: There are several dialogue options throughout this scene, but do not worry too much about which ones you choose. For now, none of them have a major consequence for the story, so pick whichever response you like. Once the interaction ends, you will arrive in your dorm room.

label: Dorm Room
alt: Makoto inside his dorm room

body: Here, the game gives a brief explanation of how saving works in Persona 3 Reload. You can save whenever the save icon appears at the bottom of the screen. The game will also explain the newly added Rewind Feature, which lets you return to earlier parts of your day from the options menu. To use it, open System, choose Rewind, and pick the time slot you want to return to.

label: Your Room
alt: Makoto checking the bed inside his dorm room

body: When the tutorials are done, save the game and head to the closet by the door. Select check the closet to stash your clothes, then walk to the bed and interact with it. As the game explains here, going to bed advances time, moving you to the next day. Time is not especially strict this early, but it will become one of the most important resources to manage later in the game. Once you are done, progress to the next day.
First Day of School
After you wake up, Yukari, the girl you met last night, will knock on your door. You will then watch a string of three cutscenes as Makoto and Yukari head to school.

label: School Building 1F
alt: Makoto checking the blue boards at school

body: When you regain control, you will be standing in the centre of the school. Your first task is to check which classroom you have been assigned to. On the right-hand side of the area ahead of you, look for the pair of blue boards with several students gathered around them. Approach the board and interact with it to read the notice. You will learn that you have been added to class 2-F. With that done, make your way to the Faculty Office.

label: Faculty Office Route
alt: Makoto heading toward the Faculty Office

body: To reach the Faculty Office, head to the west wing of the School Building's First Floor. The office is just opposite the library and is marked by the exclamation point on the mini-map in the bottom-left corner of the screen.

label: Ms Toriumi
alt: Makoto meeting Ms Toriumi in the Faculty Office

body: Inside, you will meet Ms Toriumi, who welcomes you to the school. She will take you to the auditorium for the welcoming ceremony with the principal. Watch the following scene, and time will skip forward to the end of the school day.

label: Class 2-F
alt: Makoto meeting Junpei in class

body: Back in class, you will meet Junpei. Continue through the scene until Yukari joins the conversation. Some dialogue choices may be unavailable because Makoto does not have enough of a certain Social Stat yet. These stats are non-combat skills that will grow throughout the game. You do not need to worry about them much right now, but they will affect parts of Social Links later.

After the conversation, Junpei offers to show Makoto around the school. This is mostly a chance to learn the layout of the School Building, which you will visit often. Talk to students with speech bubble icons if you want extra flavor, then leave Class 2-F.

label: School Tour
alt: Junpei showing Makoto around Gekkoukan High School

body: You will arrive in the second-floor corridor. You are free to talk to anyone nearby. When you are ready to continue, use the stairs on either side of the corridor to return to the entrance area on the first floor.

You can explore the school a little longer if you want, but it is not required. When you are ready, leave through the school entrance. A short scene will play, and Makoto will arrive at Iwatodai Station.

label: Iwatodai Station
alt: Makoto returning to Iwatodai Station after school

body: Take the same route you used at the beginning of the game: go southwest, enter Iwatodai Strip Mall, then turn right near Wild-duck Burger. This time, instead of sending you straight to the dorm, the game opens the Town Map.

label: Town Map
alt: Persona 3 Reload town map

body: The Town Map lets you fast travel between available locations. At this point, your options are limited to places like school, the station, and the dorm, but more areas will unlock as the story progresses. For now, select the Dorm.

label: Dorm Entrance
alt: Makoto arriving outside Iwatodai Dorm

body: Once you arrive outside the dorm, enter through the front door to move from after school to evening. After a short conversation with Mitsuru, you will be allowed to explore the dorm more freely. Look around if you want to learn the layout, since the dorm will become one of your main hubs.

label: Dorm Evening
alt: Makoto speaking with Mitsuru at the dorm

body: When you are ready to move on, go upstairs to 2F, follow the corridor to your room, enter, save, and use the bed to sleep. After resting, a cutscene will play with Akihiko and Mitsuru.
Second Day at School

The next morning begins your second school day. During class, you will receive your first classroom question. These questions appear throughout the game, and answering correctly rewards Social Stat points, usually toward Charm.

Persona 3 Reload has three Social Stats to build over time: Charm, Courage, and Academics. You will raise them through class answers, activities, and other daily choices. For this first question, the correct answer is Vivid Carp Streamers.

label: Shuji Ikutsuki
alt: Makoto meeting Shuji Ikutsuki at the dorm

body: After class, the story returns you to the dorm, where you will meet Shuji Ikutsuki, the school chairman and a frequent visitor to the dormitory. After a brief conversation, he will suggest that Makoto rest for the night.

label: Velvet Room
alt: Makoto meeting Igor and Elizabeth in the Velvet Room

body: Makoto will go to sleep automatically, triggering several story scenes that reveal more about the strange events at the dorm and introduce the Velvet Room, a mysterious realm you will visit many times to work with Igor and Elizabeth.
Makoto's Persona Awakens

label: Lecture Choice
alt: Makoto choosing whether to stay awake or close his eyes during class

body: After the sequence ends, Makoto wakes up on April 9 and attends school again. During class, a new lecture option appears: you can either stay awake or doze off. Dozing off raises Courage, while staying awake raises Academics. Choose based on the stat you want to build.

label: Paulownia Mall
alt: Junpei taking Makoto to Paulownia Mall

body: After class, Junpei will take you to Paulownia Mall, another important Town Map location. Later, this area will be useful for raising stats, meeting people, and visiting late-night Social Links.

After the outing, you will return to the dorm automatically. Speak with Mitsuru, then go upstairs to your room and sleep. This triggers another set of cutscenes, and this time Akihiko brings serious trouble back to the dorm.

label: Dorm Emergency
alt: Akihiko returning to the dorm during the Dark Hour

body: During the emergency, Yukari runs to Makoto's room and wakes him, giving him a Shortsword for protection. Once you regain control, the threat outside the dorm is close to breaking through. Yukari tells you to head upstairs, so run to the staircase and keep climbing.

label: Rooftop Threat
alt: Makoto protecting Yukari on the dorm rooftop

body: Continue upward until a cutscene plays on the roof. During this sequence, Makoto discovers the mysterious power within himself.
First Fight

label: Weakness Hit
alt: Makoto exploiting an enemy weakness in his first fight

body: When the cutscene ends, you will enter your first battle. In combat, Makoto can choose between Attack, Guard, Persona, and Item. Attack uses the equipped weapon, Guard reduces incoming damage, Item uses inventory items, and Persona lets Makoto cast skills.

label: Agi
alt: Makoto selecting Agi from Orpheus's Persona skills

body: The enemies here are Cowardly Mayas, and they are weak to fire. Open the Persona command, choose Agi, and target one Maya. Hitting an enemy weakness knocks it down and grants another turn. Use Agi on each Maya to finish the fight quickly.

After the battle, Makoto passes out and returns to the Velvet Room. Igor begins explaining Social Links, bonds that will make newly created Personas stronger. Social Links will become a major part of the game soon.

Makoto wakes up in a hospital bed a week later. Speak with Yukari, then return to the dorm. There is not much else to do yet besides looking around, so head back to your room and sleep when you are ready.
Fourth Day at School

label: History Question
alt: The History class question

body: Despite being unconscious for a week, Makoto returns to school the next day. In History class, you will receive another question. The correct answer is Middens.
After class, Yukari offers to walk home with you. When you reach the dorm, she tells you to meet everyone upstairs on 4F for a dorm meeting.

label: Twilight Fragment
alt: Makoto finding a Twilight Fragment in his room

body: Go to your room first. A cutscene will play as Makoto finds a Twilight Fragment beside his pillow. After collecting it, leave your room and head up to the fourth floor.

label: S.E.E.S. Meeting
alt: The S.E.E.S. meeting on the dorm's fourth floor

body: When you arrive, Yukari will be waiting outside the doors. Speak to her to begin a long conversation with Ikutsuki, Akihiko, Mitsuru, and Yukari about the Dark Hour. During the meeting, Makoto officially joins S.E.E.S. and unlocks his first Social Link.

label: Fool Arcana
alt: The Fool Arcana Social Link reaching rank one

body: This unlocks the Fool Arcana, which represents Makoto's bond with S.E.E.S. as a group. Social Links show how close Makoto is to people in his life, and they also strengthen newly created Personas that share the same Arcana. Persona creation is not available yet, but soon Social Links will become one of the most important systems in the game.

label: Dark Hour Visitor
alt: The mysterious boy visiting Makoto during the Dark Hour

body: After the meeting, the night continues with another unsettling Dark Hour scene. Makoto is visited by the mysterious boy again, hinting that the situation surrounding the Dark Hour is larger than the group fully understands. Watch the scene to close out this part of the Prologue.
